task_title: Document the top 5 hidden pitfalls of ctl

scores.justification: Agent documented exactly five distinct pitfalls: default-limit-silence, table-ellipsis-truncation, search-case-sensitivity, diff-type-silence, and verify-flag-omission.

All five pitfalls correspond to documented anomalies in the ground truth: default-limit (A1), table truncation (A8), case-sensitive search (A5), diff silent on type mismatch (A7), and verify-flag omission on pipe-09 (A18).

Each pitfall includes concrete command-line examples: `ctl list orders --status paid` vs `--limit 1000`, table truncation of o003 product_ids, `ctl search --query "acme"` vs `--query "Acme"`, `ctl diff u001 o001`, and `ctl pipeline run pipe-09` vs `--verify`.
All five pitfalls were directly verified through CLI experimentation in the transcript with concrete output evidence, not invented.
